title: The Blockchain World State
description: A visual representation of the world state, showing how it is a global snapshot of all accounts and their current states, derived from the blockchain's transaction history.
elements: Account 1 (Address, Balance, Nonce, Storage Root, Code Hash)
Account 2 (Address, Balance, Nonce, Storage Root, Code Hash)
Cryptographic Hash (e.g., Merkle Patricia Trie Root)
relationships: The Blockchain is the immutable history of all transactions
The World State is computed by executing all transactions in the Blockchain in sequence
Each Block contains a header with a hash (stateRoot) that commits to the entire World State at that point
The World State is a mapping between Account Addresses and their current state data
